response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack software craftsman with ~20 years of hands-on engineering experience, but the role requires a Director-level IC Principal Engineer with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud/AI strategy leadership. The resume shows only recent, light exposure to AI-agent tooling (MCP generators) and no evidence of principal-level strategic influence, AI research credentials, or shipped AI products at scale. Title and scope (Senior/Staff developer) sit well below the seniority bar.
strengths: Broad multi-decade polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Recent contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, teaching, open-source founder)
concerns: No demonstrated principal/director-level IC scope or strategic advisory work with customers/partners
Limited recognized AI expertise — no shipped AI products, publications, or advanced AI/ML degree
Cloud strategy depth is thin; experience is primarily product engineering rather than platform/AI strategy

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and shipped AI platforms
Long, diverse engineering tenure and craftsmanship
